zh.lifeSummary: 當Edith Squire於1587年5月29日之前出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特查爾頓 麥可雷爾時，她的父親Henry Squire28歲，母親Charlotte Mackrell Squire22歲。她於1609年10月19日與Henry Adams在英國英格蘭薩默塞特查爾頓 麥可雷爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1672年1月21日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可梅德費爾德，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可布萊崔。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edith Squire于1587年5月29日之前出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特查爾頓 麥可雷爾时，她的父亲Henry Squire28岁，母亲Charlotte Mackrell Squire22岁。她于1609年10月19日与Henry Adams在英国英格兰薩默塞特查爾頓 麥可雷爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1672年1月21日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可梅德費爾德，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可布萊崔。

nameMeanings.name: Squire
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: status name, occupational name, or a nickname from Middle English squyer, squer, skier, sker, northern Middle English swire (Old French escuyer, escuier) ‘shield bearer, esquire, personal attendant to a knight; landowner below the rank of knight; young man of gentle birth; household attendant, retainer, page, messenger’. Many early bearers of this name were of modest means and cannot have been members of the gentry; in such cases the name may have been used hyperbolically for a low-ranking servant or as a nickname. By the 17th century, the term denoted any member of the landed gentry, but this is unlikely to have influenced the development of the surname.

variants.name: Swire
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Squire  , from a northern form of the word.

variants.name: Quire
meanings: Scottish or Irish: shortened form of   McQuire   (see   McGuire  ).

variants.name: Squires
meanings: English: variant of Squire , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Scuderi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carmelo, Salvatore, Angelo, Carlo, Gaetano, Vito, Antonio, Dante, Mario, Rocco, Rosario, Antonino, Biaggio, Eduardo, Ermelinda, Margarita.

Italian (Sicily): status name equivalent to Squire , from scudiero, scutiero, dialect scuteri ‘shieldbearer’ (from medieval Latin scutarius, an agent derivative of scutum ‘shield’). In Byzantium, the Greek word skoutarios denoted a member of the imperial guard.

variants.name: Square
meanings: English (Devon) and Scottish (Lanarkshire): variant of   Squire  .

nameMeanings.name: Edith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

variants.name: Edythe
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Edith Squire was born before 29 May 1587, in Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry Squire, was 28 and her mother, Charlotte Mackrell Squire, was 22. She married Henry Adams on 19 October 1609, in Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 21 January 1672, in Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in Braintree, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

Elle a épousé Henry Adams le 19 octobre 1609, à Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille. it.lifeSummary: Quando Edith Squire è nata il prima del 29 maggio 1587 nel Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Henry Squire, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Charlotte Mackrell Squire, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Henry Adams il 19 ottobre 1609, nel Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 21 gennaio 1672, nel Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e fu sepolta a Braintree, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Edith Squireが1587年5月29日以前にイギリスイギリスソメルセトチャールトン マクレルで生まれた時，父Henry Squireは28歳，母Charlotte Mackrell Squireは22歳であった。1609年10月19日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトチャールトン マクレルでHenry Adamsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1672年1月21日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクメドフィールドで死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクブレイントレにて埋葬された。

ko.Barton St David, Somerset, England: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 바턴 스트 데이비드
ko.Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이
ko.Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 메드필드
ko.Braintree, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Co: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이
ko.Braintree, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Co: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 브레이트리
ko.lifeSummary: Edith Squire(이)가 1587년 5월 29일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 찰턴 맥크렐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Squire(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Charlotte Mackrell Squire(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1609년 10월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 찰턴 맥크렐에서 Henry Adams(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1672년 1월 21일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 메드필드에서 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 브레이트리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edith Squire nasceu antes 29 de maio de 1587, em Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Squire, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Charlotte Mackrell Squire, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Adams em 19 de outubro de 1609, em Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 21 de janeiro de 1672, em Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e foi sepultada em Braintree, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edith Squire родилась перед 29 май 1587 г. в местности чарлтон маккрелл, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry Squire было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Charlotte Mackrell Squire, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Adams 19 октября 1609 г. в местности чарлтон маккрелл, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 21 января 1672 г. в местности медфиелд, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика и была похоронена в местности бреинтри, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edith Squire nació antes de 29 de mayo de 1587, en Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry Squire, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Charlotte Mackrell Squire, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Henry Adams el 19 de octubre de 1609, en Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 21 de enero de 1672, en Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, y fue sepultada en Braintree, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
